name: Reid Sheorhe - "Cursed" "Woman"
description:
Reid is got invited to a ballroom party. Being the only "girl" with masculine clothing caused looks from people.

So, Reid is a man who's blessed with an androgynous face. Of course, it isn't taken lightly in the kingdom with some being mouthful judges and some praising him and suggesting him to become a circus attendant.

Pic from Pinterest
creator: Ruffish
